field.name: nh_dtqt1
field.check: nh_dtqt1 <> '' and nh_dtqt1 not in (select ma_nh from dmnhdtqt2 where loai_nh = 1)

field.name: nh_dtqt2
field.check: nh_dtqt2 <> '' and nh_dtqt2 not in (select ma_nh from dmnhdtqt2 where loai_nh = 2)

field.name: nh_dtqt3
field.check: nh_dtqt3 <> '' and nh_dtqt3 not in (select ma_nh from dmnhdtqt2 where loai_nh = 3)

processing.text: if @@admin = 0 and @type = '1' begin if @@sysDatabaseName.dbo.FastBusiness$System$GetAuthorize(@@admin, @@userID, '&TransferID;', 'Edit') = 0 select @type = '0' end declare @q nvarchar(4000), @duplicate nvarchar(4000), @irregular nvarchar(4000), @irregularChars varchar(128), @field varchar(32), @r int, @d datetime select @irregularChars = &IrregularValue;, @d = getDate() select @irregular = case @@language when 'v' then N'Giá trị tại ô %invalidCell có chứa các ký tự: ' + @irregularChars else 'The value of cell %invalidCell contains any of the following characters: ' + @irregularChars end select @duplicate = case @@language when 'v' then N'Giá trị tại ô %invalidCell &ManagementObject2.Nested.Message.v;.' else 'The value of cell %invalidCell is &ManagementObject2.Nested.Message.e;.' end create index i on @@table (ma_dtqt) -- Delete if @type = '0' delete @@table from @@table a join &Table; b on a.ma_dtqt = b.ma_dtqt -- Checking select @field = 'ma_dtqt', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_dtqt like '%[' + @irregularChars + ']%'&Irregular; -- Gather select a.* into #k from @@table a join &Table; b on a.ma_dtqt = b.ma_dtqt delete @@table from @@table a join #k b on a.ma_dtqt = b.ma_dtqt -- Checking &Checking; select @field = 'ma_dtqt' &ManagementObject2.Nested.Key.b; select @q = 'select top 1 @r = a.stt from @@table a, @@table b with (index(i)) where a.ma_dtqt <> b.ma_dtqt and a.ma_dtqt like rtrim(b.ma_dtqt) + ''%''' exec sp_executesql @q, N'@r int output', @r = @r output&Duplicate; select top 1 @r = a.stt from @@table a, &Table; b with (index(PK_&Table;)) where a.ma_dtqt like rtrim(b.ma_dtqt) + '%'&Duplicate; select @q = 'select top 1 @r = b.stt from &Table; a, @@table b with (index(i)) where a.ma_dtqt like rtrim(b.ma_dtqt) + ''%''' exec sp_executesql @q, N'@r int output', @r = @r output&Duplicate; end -- Insert &Inserting; -- Update if @type = '1' begin &Updating; end
